ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction (e.g., BC, AB, SK, MB, ON) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the jurisdiction */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city or main city of the jurisdiction */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., state, province, territory) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the health authorities in the jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health measure */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction where the measure is in effect */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the measure */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the measure was first implemented */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the measure was lifted or expired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the measure (e.g., active, expired, extended) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the measure (e.g., government, health authority) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the measure */,
  "schools_universities" TEXT /* Date when schools and universities were closed or restricted */,
  "travel_restrictions" TEXT /* Date when travel restrictions were implemented */,
  "public_events" TEXT /* Date when public events were restricted or canceled */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Date when sports events were restricted or canceled */,
  "lockdown" TEXT /* Date when a lockdown was enforced */,
  "social_distancing_encouraged" TEXT /* Date when social distancing was encouraged */,
  "self_isolating_if_ill" TEXT /* Date when self-isolation was recommended for those feeling ill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_measures_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools_universities" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health measure */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* Date when schools and universities were closed or restricted */,
  "reopen_date" TEXT /* Date when schools and universities reopened */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or guidelines related to the closure */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of educational institution (e.g., primary, secondary, university) */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Number of students and staff affected by the closure */,
  "online_learning_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for online learning (e.g., Zoom, Google Classroom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_events" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health measure */,
  "restriction_date" TEXT /* Date when public events were restricted or canceled */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event affected (e.g., concerts, sports, conferences) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or guidelines related to the restriction */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "estimated_attendees" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "rescheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was rescheduled, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel restriction */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health measure */,
  "restriction_type" TEXT /* Type of travel restriction (e.g., international, domestic, inter-jurisdiction) */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the restriction */,
  "travel_mode" TEXT /* Mode of travel affected (e.g., air, road, rail) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or guidelines related to the restriction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_restrictions_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES health_measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lockdowns" (
  "lockdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lockdown */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health measure */,
  "lockdown_type" TEXT /* Type of lockdown (e.g., full, partial) */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the lockdown */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or guidelines related to the lockdown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lockdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lockdowns_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES health_measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_distancing" (
  "distancing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social distancing measure */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health measure */,
  "distancing_type" TEXT /* Type of social distancing (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "guidelines" TEXT /* Guidelines provided for social distancing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distancing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_distancing_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES health_measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "self_isolation" (
  "isolation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each self-isolation measure */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health measure */,
  "isolation_type" TEXT /* Type of self-isolation (e.g., home, designated facility) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or guidelines related to self-isolation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isolation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_self_isolation_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES health_measures ("measure_id")
)
